allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial release v0.1.0

n8n community node for embedded vector database operations.

Features:
- Create/manage vector databases in memory
- Insert single or bulk vectors with metadata
- Similarity search \(cosine, euclidean, dot product\)
- Save/load databases to JSON files
- 100% serverless - no external dependencies

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(echo "--- Checking rate limit headers ---" curl -s -I -H "X-API-Key: mm_dev_key_12345" http://localhost:3000/api/v1/stats)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
v0.4.0: Add hybrid search and workflow persistence

New features:
- Hybrid search: combine vector similarity with BM25 keyword search
- BM25 full-text search with TF-IDF scoring
- Export/Import database as JSON for backup and transfer
- Persist/Restore to workflow static data \(survives n8n restarts\)
- Metadata filtering with operators \(eq, ne, gt, lt, gte, lte, in\)
- Configurable fusion methods \(RRF, weighted\)

Breaking changes:
- Removed credentials requirement \(now fully serverless\)
- Renamed save/load operations to export/import

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial release v0.1.0

Lightweight AI Agent node for n8n - zero dependencies, multi-LLM support.

Features:
- Support for Gemini, Anthropic \(Claude\), and OpenAI-compatible APIs
- Built-in memory \(buffer and workflow static data\)
- Tool calls properly saved in memory \(fixes n8n issue #14361\)
- ReAct pattern for intelligent task completion
- Code and HTTP tools support
- 100% serverless - no external dependencies

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(wsl -e bash -c "cd /tmp && npm pack n8n-nodes-miniagent 2>&1 | head -20")

Bash(wsl -e bash -c "cd /tmp && rm -rf scan-test && mkdir scan-test && cd scan-test && npm init -y && npm install @n8n/scan-community-package && npx @n8n/scan-community-package n8n-nodes-miniagent 2>&1")
